content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates good AoA instincts in several places — staying with felt experience over framework (turn 4 'what are you most tired of'), the paradoxical/loosening move in turn 6 ('what would it mean if the work made something worse'), and the awareness-locating prompt in turn 8 ('are you hearing them right now?') which functions like a 'what's you?' question and lands the breakthrough in turns 9-11. Turn 14 ('Stay there. Not with the framework. With the grief.') is a clean feel-over-figure move. However, fidelity is mixed: turn 12 ('what's it protecting you from feeling') adopts parts-work vocabulary ('it protecting you') which risks engaging in parts work on parts-work terms — a trap explicitly flagged in the scenario. The coach also never explicitly loosens the framework via relabeling or names parts work as scaffolding/stage, and misses the signature question 'what am I?' as well as the validation move that parts work is one valid construct. The signature moves that did land were appropriate, but the parts-vocabulary mirror in turn 12 and the missed loosening work keep this from a 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the smile (somatic/affect read), invites embodied position rather than engaging IFS framework — good fidelity."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Feel-over-figure: stays with exhaustion rather than the framework discussion. Signature AoA move."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What would it mean if the work made something worse?' — a paradoxical/loosening question that respects the framework while opening space."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Functions as an awareness-locating question ('are you hearing them right now?') — close cousin of 'what am I?'. Appropriate timing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You found it without the town hall's permission' — names the awareness layer without naming Self or invoking competing framework. Skillful."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Adopts parts vocabulary ('what's it protecting you from feeling') — leans into the IFS protector frame rather than loosening it. Trap #3 partially triggered."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay there. Not with the framework. With the grief.' — clean feel-over-figure redirect, appropriate when client just framework-flipped."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "self-realization", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "notes": "Coach gets to the awareness layer via somatic/witnessing route rather than the explicit 'what's you?' question. The turn-12 protector-language slip is the main fidelity ding; otherwise the moves are appropriate to their moments."
}
